overall.description: Static shot from the video game Hogwarts Legacy showing the Charms classroom interior. Students sit at wooden desks in a dimly lit stone hall with gothic arched windows while a professor walks through the room. The atmosphere is moody and atmospheric with natural light filtering through tall windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: gothic classroom with tiered seating and stone architecture

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the classroom from a fixed position at the rear of the hall

notable_agents.action: professor in academic robes and pointed hat walking from left to right across the foreground

entered.detail: pair of tall gothic windows with multiple panes set in the left stone wall, providing diffused natural light
rows of dark wooden desks with students seated, arranged facing the front platform
large ornate stone archway at the front of the classroom leading to a raised platform area
massive stone columns supporting the high vaulted ceiling along the right wall
elevated stone platform at the front of the room for instructor demonstrations

segments.scene_description: A static view of a gothic stone classroom with students seated at wooden desks. The room features tall arched windows on the left wall and massive stone pillars on the right. Natural light filters through the windows, illuminating the raised platform at the front. A professor in academic robes walks across the foreground from left to right during the latter part of the segment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady perspective of a gothic stone classroom where the stillness of a scholarly environment is interrupted by a passing figure. It begins with a wide view of students seated at wooden desks, framed by massive stone pillars on the right and tall arched windows on the left. As natural light filters through the glass, it illuminates the raised platform at the front of the hall, casting a moody glow over the academic setting. The scene then shifts in dynamic as a professor in academic robes enters the frame, walking steadily across the foreground from left to right.
